item.title: X creator push exposes pay gap facing Australian creators and publishers
item.description: The new X Creator Connect raises questions about Australian creator income, TikTok monetisation and payments.

item.title: Former prime minister Tony Abbott named federal Liberal Party president
item.description: ‘I regard it as my duty to serve the party in this time of existential crisis.’

item.title: Australian study challenges forgetfulness and mental fog known as ‘baby brain’ in mums and dads after childbirth
item.description: Researchers warn the powerful social narrative could become a self-fulfilling prophecy.

item.title: MND cases rising in Australia as researchers hunt for breakthrough treatments
item.description: The death of AFL great Neale Daniher from motor neurone disease and NRL player Jai Arrow's diagnosis have thrust the cruel condition back into the spotlight.

item.title: Helicopter pilot breaks long silence on F1 legend Michael Schumacher’s mountain rescue
item.description: ‘When the commander ordered us to remove our microphones ... I understood that it was true.’

item.title: Three climbers killed after fall near Denali Pass on Alaska’s Mount McKinley
item.description: A fourth mountaineer was dramatically rescued by helicopter after the group plunged along one of the peak’s most dangerous routes.

item.title: Diesel boost on the water for bottlenecked Queensland regions
item.description: Regional servos are expected to receive extra fuel as authorities scramble to ease mounting pressure on supplies.

item.title: Vivid performances scrapped after drones fall from sky in Sydney performance
item.description: ‘Public safety will always remain the highest priority.’

item.title: Troubled singer Britney Spears talks of ‘emotional issues’ after arrest over reckless driving
item.description: ‘This year has been quite interesting.’

item.title: Champion jockey James McDonald equals 45-year-old record with latest Group 1 triumph
item.description: The superstar has added yet another accolade to his growing list.

item.title: Marquinhos consoles Arsenal’s Gabriel Magalhaes after shootout miss hands Champions League title to PSG
item.description: The skipper put his own celebrations on hold to check on the rival whose horror penalty ended the match.

item.title: Mexico ‘blow up deluxe’ as Socceroos scuffle over sly tactic late in 1-0 defeat to World Cup co-hosts
item.description: ‘World Cup tension’ was in the air after Mexico pounced with the referee’s back turned.

item.title: Luxury Escapes launches nationwide search for ‘Travel Tester’ role worth $50,000
item.description: Luxury Escapes’ ‘Travel Tester’ will be paid to travel the world, stay in resorts and bring a plus one along for the ride.

item.title: Experts call for further research into brain fog symptoms in menopause
item.description: Many women experience varying degrees of forgetfulness, attention or concentration difficulties.

item.title: Cristian Volpato headlines Socceroos’ World Cup squad after dramatic last-ditch switch
item.description: The 22-year-old has vaulted right into the mix for a start but there was fresh heartbreak for a heart-and-soul veteran.

item.title: Mary Fowler’s Manchester City win FA Cup title on emotional day for Brighton’s Aussie coach Dario Vidosic
item.description: The Matildas star lifted the trophy on a day her opponent’s Australian coach and his late father were in everyone’s hearts.

item.title: Olympic stadium build to begin on Victoria Park as protests continue
item.description: The construction will go ahead despite protestors swarming the Brisbane park in a last-ditch effort.

item.title: Kate Ritchie has emotional reunion with former Home and Away co-stars
item.description: ‘I know exactly who it is.’

item.title: Australian man arrested in Vietnam over damage to cafe
item.description: The shirtless man allegedly caused more than $20,000 worth of damage during the outburst.

item.title: Farmer Wants A Wife 2026: Rodeo cowboy Dylan reveals the dream that cost him love
item.description: ‘It becomes a little bit of a make or break.’

item.title: Much-loved Socceroo Martin Boyle releases short statement after World Cup heartbreak
item.description: The 33-year-old’s World Cup dreams have been crushed for a second time.

item.title: SA budget: Treasurer Tom Koutsantonis to unveil a modest budget as state’s finances take a hit
item.description: Treasurer Tom Koutsantonis faces soaring costs, rising debt and major infrastructure pressures.

item.title: Collingwood captain Darcy Moore jets off in desperate bid to overcome injuries
item.description: The 30-year-old has headed overseas to meet with world-leading specialists.

item.title: Big changes coming at Collingwood as CEO Craig Kelly plans shock exit
item.description: ‘He could be gone by the end of this season.’

item.title: Vulnerable Adelaide teen urges sick Australians to stay home this winter
item.description: The 14-year-old was sent to emergency by a mild virus as health experts warn a winter spike is coming.

item.title: Australians urged to shop around as specialists charge thousands more for surgery
item.description: New data shows some specialists are charging patients thousands more than others for common procedures.

item.title: La La Land composer Justin Hurwitz praises Sydney student Sterling Nasa after saving concert performance at Darling Harbour Theatre
item.description: ‘Not bad for a Saturday night’.

item.title: Hantavirus cruise ship given the green light to set sail again after disinfection
item.description: Authorities cleared the Hondius for service, adding that there was no longer any risk of infection.

item.title: Residents and tourists rattled by double explosion at Maltese fireworks factory
item.description: Shocking footage circulating online captured the moment the 1.9 magnitude blast shook the surrounding area.

item.title: Serena Williams confirms tennis comeback at Queen’s Club aged 44
item.description: ‘The perfect place to begin ⁠this ‌next chapter.’

item.title: Kenyans protest planned Ebola quarantine station for US citizens
item.description: ‘We are picketing for our lives.’

item.title: Farmer Wants A Wife 2026: Apple farmer Zac reveals his search for love as life gets tough
item.description: ‘Something as little as hail damage on one day can change everything.’

item.title: Iran-US peace negotiations falter as ceasefire on shaky ground
item.description: Ongoing peace talks hinge on Israel and Hezbollah maintaining a precarious ceasefire agreement.

item.title: Cost-of-living crisis pushes foster carers to breaking point: ‘Should not have to fight for shoes and clothing’
item.description: Desperate families say the few hundred dollars they get each week is nowhere near enough to give children the lives they deserve.

item.title: World No.104 Matteo Arnaldi producing late-night miracle to defeat Frances Tiafoe at French Open
item.description: The marathon man outlasted the 19th seed in another five-set pic to continue his remarkable run.

item.title: Patagonia launches trademark lawsuit against drag queen and activist Pattie Gonia
item.description: In January, the company launched a trademark infringement lawsuit against Pattie Gonia.

item.title: Federal government sanctions extremist West Bank settler farms in response to ongoing violence
item.description: ‘The individuals and entities sanctioned today have undermined Israel’s own security and its standing in the world.’

item.title: ‘Disastrous’ prediction for thousands of new homeowners amid market downturn
item.description: ‘For those that have recently bought, it’s a very real danger.’

item.title: James Van Der Beek’s ex-wife Heather McComb remarries four months after the actor’s death
item.description: The 49-year-old was married to the Dawson’s Creek star from 2003 to 2010.

item.title: Santorini: Woman causes outrage after spreading loved one’s ashes through busy streets of tourist hotspot
item.description: Locals are up in arms over the incident described as a ‘health bomb’ by a furious official.

item.title: Consumer watchdog investigates online sales of potentially deadly magnetic toys at Amazon, eBay, Kogan
item.description: Banned items have been found in a range of toys sold by major retailers.

item.title: Tennis icon John McEnroe counting down until to return home from French Open ahead of NBA Finals
item.description: ‘The time has come. I’ve been waiting only 53 years.’

item.title: Seven dead including gunman after series of shootings in Muscatine, Iowa
item.description: A preliminary investigation indicated the killings ‘stemmed from a domestic-related dispute’.

item.title: Residents feared trapped under rubble as Kyiv homes targeted in major Russian strikes
item.description: Dozens of people including children have been wounded in the large-scale attack.

item.title: Clean-up efforts continue in WA after powerful storm leaves thousands without power
item.description: Emergency response crews are continuing to address a significant number of hazards.

item.title: Queensland’s e-bike and e-scooter laws watered down
item.description: Controversial e-reforms are expected to pass parliament this week, with new penalties coming into force as early as July 1.

item.title: Jockey Kristy Bennett seriously injured in horrific fall at Gold Coast trials
item.description: The 29-year-old has been rushed to hospital after her horse crossed the line and collapsed.

item.title: Norwegian princess Ingrid Alexandra returns home from Australia as mother Crown Princess Mette-Marit’s condition worsens
item.description: The 22-year-old royal has been studying international relations and political economy at the University of Sydney.

item.title: Optus crowned most distrusted Aussie brand as new Roy Morgan rankings drop
item.description: Australians have delivered their verdict on brands they trust and the ones they don’t.

item.title: Annastacia Palaszczuk’s partner Dr Reza Adib suspended amid rape and sexual assault charges
item.description: Prominent surgeon Reza Adib has vowed to vigorously defend the allegations against him.

item.title: Melbourne teams to merge in bombshell BBL shake-up
item.description: Staff have been told of the shock decision that will see a new franchise enter the competition.

item.title: Paradise Country closed after newly added Tasmanian devil ‘Mary’ vanishes at Gold Coast theme park
item.description: Thermal cameras and drones will be deployed as wildlife staff race to find the young creature.

item.title: Allen’s lolly iNSiDE OUTS recalled nationwide after plastic found in some packets
item.description: Eating the recalled snack could cause illness or injury.

item.title: Migraine prevention drug Emgality put on the Pharmaceutical Benefits Scheme, now hundreds of dollars cheaper
item.description: One woman was previously forced to ditch the treatment and rely only on Botox injections because of the cost.

item.title: Australia hits 28 million population milestone driven by migration not new births
item.description: We're growing faster than ever before with a new person added every 75 seconds.

item.title: Taylor Swift reveals surprise Toy Story 5 song I Knew It, I Knew You: ‘Meant to be’
item.description: The song is set to be released globally later this week.

item.title: Seven unveils golden Glasgow 2026 Commonwealth Games broadcast team
item.description: Much-loved icon Bruce McAvaney will lead the team that boasts 34 Comm Games medals.

item.title: Nathan Ellis saves Australia’s blushes in 41-run win over Pakistan
item.description: The Aussies picked three spinners but it was a seamer who provided the breakthroughs.

item.title: French Open contender Marta Kostyuk emotional after reaching semi-finals
item.description: A champion put her interviewing duties on hold to step around the mic and comfort the winner following ‘a very difficult night’.

item.title: Middle East war: President Donald Trump denies halting of US-Iran peace deal amid Lebanon strikes, as Mark Rubio reveals nuclear budging in
item.description: ‘The conversations between us have been going on continuously’

item.title: Farmer Wants A Wife 2026: Jason shares realities of juggling farm work and being a dad
item.description: ‘That has been a big thing in my past dating history.’

item.title: Grammy Award-winning singer behind classic Disney songs dead at 75
item.description: Peabo Bryson, the R&B singer known for duets from Disney’s ‘Aladdin’ and ‘Beauty and the Beast,’ died days after having a stroke.

item.title: Caroline Wilson recounts how an accidental text message exposed the Melbourne Demons tanking scandal
item.description: ‘Sometimes you just get lucky.’

item.title: Real concern clouds Bushrangers return as Indian ownership looms large for axed Renegades
item.description: Emotions are running high as cricket officials prepare for more conversations on the sensitive topic.

item.title: Nature’s Own Glucosamine Sulfate with Chondroitin and Magnesium Glycinate recalled over glass risk
item.description: The products are sold nationwide at multiple chemists and some supermarkets.

item.title: Warning over common wet weather driving mistake that can cost Aussie drivers thousands
item.description: There are significantly more fines issued for the infraction in winter than summer.

item.title: Jai Arrow set for special AFL appearance at King’s Birthday clash as NRL locks in ‘Jai July’ fundraiser
item.description: A swift and fitting return to Australia looms for the 30-year-old following a stint at an overseas wellness retreat.

item.title: Pat Cummins pokes fun at Melbourne Stars after BBL merger news
item.description: The shake-up may have stunned the cricket world, but the Aussie Test captain can see a funny side.

item.title: Essendon great Tim Watson strongly opposes plan for AFL assistance package: ‘No, no no’
item.description: ‘That whole thinking has to stop.’

item.title: Volkswagen Amarok W475: Opportunity for turbo-petrol Walkinshaw
item.description: Despite its turbo-diesel engine, the new Amarok W600 by Walkinshaw has been created for drivers – but could a turbo-petrol version happen?

item.title: 2027 Volkswagen Amarok W600 by Walkinshaw revealed
item.description: Volkswagen has again partnered with Walkinshaw Automotive to create a ute designed for drivers, born from customer feedback and data.

item.title: Volkswagen Amarok W600 Walkinshaw review: Quick drive
item.description: Volkswagen has unleashed the engineers from Walkinshaw on the Amarok, and says the result is the “ultimate driver’s ute”. Can it live up to the claim?

item.title: 2026 Jaecoo J5 review
item.description: The Jaecoo J5 is good enough to steal the best-value small SUV crown from its Chery Tiggo 4 stablemate – and convincingly, too.

item.title: Former Carlton president Luke Sayers fails in bid to get lewd photo case heard in private
item.description: The judge has explained the decision after Luke Sayers wanted the defamation case moved to another court.

item.title: BYD says Australians will decide if it can topple Toyota
item.description: BYD's second consecutive month as Australia's second-best-selling brand has seen its vice president play down suggestions it could soon overtake Toyota.

item.title: Tasmanian devil Mary caught on CCTV escaping Paradise Country as search ramps up
item.description: Thermal drones, sniffer dogs and wildlife crews have been deployed to help find the animal.

item.description: Manly have turned to their last premiership-winning coach in the hunt for more glory.

item.description: The 23-year-old is a ‘realist’ and knows what it takes to get back in favour.

item.title: Jayden Day: Shooting suspect charged after pursuit across Victoria and NSW
item.description: Police spent a week trying to find Jayden Day after a series of violent incidents.

item.title: Shocking police video of handcuffed teen dying sparks outrage across the UK amid rising racial tension
item.description: Cops dismissed the teen’s cries after he was stabbed by a man who falsely alleged a racist attack.

item.description: The rising star admitted to feeling ‘shocked’ by the situation.

item.description: The heat’s gone from auctions, handing first-home buyers a rare win.

item.description: ‘I think they paid 1.7 million for the wrong player.’

item.description: The man who killed Thomas Kelly in an unprovoked one-punch attack 14 years ago has fronted court again.

item.description: The five-year-old was rushed to hospital after a two-car collision.

item.description: ‘(It was) filling up our verandah area with blackwater ... You could see toilet paper.’

item.description: They're already ferrying passengers across America's biggest cities, now the company wants to come Down Under.

item.description: He was jailed at 13 for abducting and fatally stabbing his three-year-old neighbour Courtney Morley-Clarke.

item.description: Geelong have finally been given movement from the AFL, but there is still a ‘key issue’.

item.description: They look harmless, even cute but banned and dangerous products are flooding Australia's biggest online marketplaces.

item.description: ‘I was a little bit perturbed at his constantly fighting with Lebanon.’

item.description: ‘There can be no justification for hijacking this tragedy to stir up violence and disorder.’

item.description: Sunrise with Natalie Barr, Matt Shirvington, Edwina Bartholomew, Sam Mac and Mark Beretta is the latest news, sport, entertainment and weather. Win with the Cash Cow. Australia's most popular brekky show - Weekdays from 5:30am, weekends from 7am on Channel 7.
